subject: A bald figure with closed eyes, head tilted back, with a faint blue-white glow emanating from the eyelids — a portrait of supernatural sight or vigilance bestowed
description: A close-up portrait of a bald, dark-skinned figure with their head tilted back and eyes closed. A pale, ethereal blue-white luminance traces along the eyelids and brow, suggesting eyes that see through or beyond ordinary sight. The figure's expression is serene, near-meditative — chin lifted, mouth softly closed. The background is a pale, washed neutral that throws the head into stark relief, with subtle warm and cool gradient tones. The composition is tight and centered on the head and shoulders, lending a votive, iconic quality consistent with Theros's classical-mythic visual language.
foreground: bald human figure, head tilted back, eyes closed and faintly glowing
background: soft neutral pale gradient with warm and cool washes
emotion: serene, transcendent, blessed — head tilted back in receptive stillness
